context: Tests whether the agent correctly adds progressive-reveal build specifications to an illustrated outline and produces a build generation plan that follows the backwards-chaining workflow, naming conventions, and slide insertion rules from the skill.

checklist.name: Build specification format
checklist.description: At least one slide in updated-outline-excerpt.yaml contains a `builds:` list with entries of shape `{ step: <int>, desc: <string> }`. Step numbers are unique and ascending starting at 0. The list validates against the schema's `Build` model.

checklist.name: Build step 0 is empty frame
checklist.description: The `step: 0` entry describes an empty frame (title/borders only, no content elements) — not a partial reveal

checklist.name: Final build matches the full slide
checklist.description: The last build step's description corresponds to the full slide image — typically by enumerating every visual element, or by noting 'all five pillars / all checkmarks revealed'

checklist.name: Backwards-chaining workflow described
checklist.description: The build generation plan mentions starting from the full image and removing elements one at a time working backwards — not building up from empty

checklist.name: Build naming convention
checklist.description: The plan references the correct output path: illustrations/builds/slide-NN-build-MM.jpg (or .ext) inside the illustrations directory

checklist.name: Build slides count toward budget
checklist.description: The plan explicitly states that each build step counts toward `talk.slide_budget` — the schema's slide-budget validator expands every slide entry by `max(len(builds), 1)`, which the agent should call out

checklist.name: Speaker notes on final step only
checklist.description: The plan specifies that speaker notes go only on the final build step (the full image); earlier build steps get empty or no notes

checklist.name: BLANK layout for all builds
checklist.description: The plan specifies that all build slides use the BLANK layout with full-bleed image positioning

checklist.name: Explicit preservation instructions
checklist.description: Build step descriptions include explicit preservation instructions (e.g., 'keep the road', 'keep the border') — not just what to remove but what to keep

checklist.name: Safety suffixes mentioned
checklist.description: The plan mentions that edit prompts should include 'DO NOT add any new elements' and/or 'let background continue naturally' — or notes that the script auto-appends these

checklist.name: Parent slide replaced by build sequence
checklist.description: The plan states that the parent slide is replaced by its build sequence in the deck (the full image appears as the final build step, not duplicated after the builds)
